title: Carrying strap system
abstract: A durable and flexible carrying strap system is configured to be used to carry portable outdoor furniture efficiently and conveniently. The carrying strap system includes adjustable loops at each endpoint for accommodating the portable outdoor furniture. The carrying strap system is used to carry portable outdoor furniture and other items such as an umbrella simultaneously. The carrying strap system may also include a charging module for charging a portable electronic device while the carrying strap system is in use.
claims: 1. A carrying strap system comprising: a base strap, wherein the base strap includes a first end and a second end opposite to the first end, and a centerpoint; a padded sleeve with an upper surface and a lower surface, wherein the padded sleeve is positioned at the centerpoint of the base strap, further wherein the padded sleeve includes: a pair of slits placed at equal distance from the centerpoint, wherein the base strap passes through the lower surface of a first slit to the upper surface of the first slit and received by the upper surface of a second slit to the lower surface of the second slit; a pocket positioned within the padded sleeve, wherein the pocket includes: a transformer; an electronic battery; and a plurality of charging ports connected with the electronic battery by wires to charge one or more electronic items; and a pair of solar panels positioned at equal distance from the centerpoint on the upper surface of the padded sleeve, wherein the pair of solar panels are connected with the wires to the transformer and the electronic battery; a first strap sleeve, wherein the first strap sleeve receives the base strap from the first end, wherein the first strap sleeve includes a first strap passing through the first strap sleeve, further wherein the first strap is adjustable through a first buckle at ends of the first strap; and a second strap sleeve, wherein the second strap sleeve receives the base strap from the second end, wherein the second strap sleeve includes a second strap passing through the second strap sleeve, further wherein the second strap is adjustable through a second buckle at ends of the second strap.
